title: colombiana cosmetron
side_effects: Colombiana cosmetron can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also lead to nausea, headaches, and dizziness. In severe cases, improper use of the Colombiana cosmetron can cause liver and kidney damage, as well as increased heart rate and blood pressure. If ingested, the plant can cause vomiting, diarrhea, and stomach pain due to its toxic alkaloid content.
